import { StructuralSharingOption, ValidateSelected } from './structuralSharing.cjs'; import { AnyRouter, RegisteredRouter, RouterState } from '@tanstack/router-core'; export interface UseLocationBaseOptions<TRouter extends AnyRouter, TSelected, TStructuralSharing extends boolean = boolean> { select?: (state: RouterState<TRouter['routeTree']>['location']) => ValidateSelected<TRouter, TSelected, TStructuralSharing>; } export type UseLocationResult<TRouter extends AnyRouter, TSelected> = unknown extends TSelected ? RouterState<TRouter['routeTree']>['location'] : TSelected; /** * Read the current location from the router state with optional selection. * Useful for subscribing to just the pieces of location you care about. * * Options: * - `select`: Project the `location` object to a derived value * - `structuralSharing`: Enable structural sharing for stable references * * @returns The current location (or selected value). * @link https://tanstack.com/router/latest/docs/framework/react/api/router/useLocationHook */ export declare function useLocation<TRouter extends AnyRouter = RegisteredRouter, TSelected = unknown, TStructuralSharing extends boolean = boolean>(opts?: UseLocationBaseOptions<TRouter, TSelected, TStructuralSharing> & StructuralSharingOption<TRouter, TSelected, TStructuralSharing>): UseLocationResult<TRouter, TSelected>;
